product_summary: smart speaker with wifi and bluetooth
summary: 14 standard routes identified. 4 review-dependent routes identified. primary legislation: RED, RED-DA, RoHS, REACH, GPSR, WEEE, Ecodesign, CRA, GDPR. RED cybersecurity gating is active because connected radio functionality was detected.
analyzed_description: smart speaker with wifi and bluetooth
normalized_description: smart speaker with wifi and bluetooth
classification_summary: Classified as smart_speaker with high confidence.
primary_uncertainties: Confirm the radio bands and declared output power.
Confirm whether the smart features require cloud dependency or can operate locally.
Confirm which personal or health-related data categories are processed and whether they are stored locally, in the app, in the cloud, or not retained.
Confirm whether firmware or software updates are supported, and whether they are OTA, app-driven, local-only, or unavailable.
Confirm whether the smart features require an account, pairing flow, local-only control, or permanent cloud access.

legislations.title: Radio Equipment Directive
legislations.reason: Applicable where the product includes intentional radio transmission or reception.
triggers: Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee, Thread, Matter, NFC, or cellular connectivity

sub_articles.label: Safety
sub_articles.description: Safety and health — LVD safety objectives apply without voltage limit

sub_articles.label: Conditional
sub_articles.description: Privacy / fraud / network / emergency / software / charging routes

legislations.title: RED DA Cybersecurity
legislations.reason: Review under the RED delegated cybersecurity regime where radio equipment is internet-connected, app-connected, uses networked software features, requires account or authentication controls, or supports monetary transactions.
triggers: radio equipment with OTA, cloud, or other networked software functions
radio equipment with account, login, password, PIN, or authentication controls
radio equipment supporting payments, subscriptions, ordering, or other monetary-value transfer
legislations.notes: Treat separately from CRA. Map current RED delegated-act scope to EN 18031-1, -2, and -3 based on network, authentication, and monetary-function features.

legislations.title: RoHS Directive
legislations.reason: Generally applicable to electrical and electronic equipment unless a specific exclusion applies.

legislations.title: REACH Regulation
legislations.reason: Article-level REACH obligations should be checked for products placed on the EU market.

legislations.title: General Product Safety Regulation
legislations.reason: Residual consumer-safety review for products not fully covered by harmonised sector legislation, and horizontal safety obligations for consumer products placed on the EU market.
triggers: residual hazards outside sector-specific conformity routes

legislations.title: WEEE Directive
legislations.reason: Review collection, marking, producer-responsibility, and end-of-life obligations for finished electrical and electronic equipment. Since August 2018, WEEE follows an open-scope model unless a specific exclusion applies.
triggers: finished EEE placed on the EU market
crossed-out wheeled bin marking and producer obligations
legislations.notes: Treat WEEE as a parallel end-of-life and producer-responsibility layer, not as a CE marking route. Exclude obvious fixed-installation and industrial-infrastructure cases from automatic consumer-style WEEE matching.

legislations.title: Ecodesign Directive framework
legislations.reason: Framework-level ecodesign review for energy-related products. Substantive obligations normally apply only where a product-specific implementing measure exists.

legislations.title: Off mode, standby and networked standby ecodesign regulation
legislations.reason: Standby, off-mode, or networked-standby review may be needed for electrical/electronic products.

legislations.title: Cyber Resilience Act
legislations.family: Cybersecurity for products with digital elements
legislations.reason: Future Cyber Resilience Act obligations should be tracked separately for products with digital elements.
triggers: electronic or connected product with software
doc_impacts: software bill of materials and technical documentation review

legislations.title: General Data Protection Regulation
legislations.reason: Data-protection obligations should be reviewed where personal data is processed outside the core CE route.

standards.title: Wideband transmission systems; Data transmission equipment operating in the 2.4 GHz band
standards.reason: required traits matched: radio. additional traits matched: bluetooth, wifi. Commonly relevant for products using 2.4 GHz radio technologies such as Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Thread, or Matter over 2.4 GHz.
standards.notes: Commonly relevant for products using 2.4 GHz radio technologies such as Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Thread, or Matter over 2.4 GHz.

standards.title: EMC standard for radio equipment and services - Common technical requirements
standards.reason: required traits matched: radio. additional traits matched: bluetooth, wifi. Common EMC framework standard for radio equipment.
standards.notes: Common EMC framework standard for radio equipment.
keywords: general emc requirements for radio equipments

standards.title: EMC standard for radio equipment and services - Specific conditions for broadband data transmission systems
standards.reason: required traits matched: radio. additional traits matched: bluetooth, wifi. Specific EMC conditions for broadband data transmission radio equipment such as Wi-Fi and Bluetooth.
standards.notes: Specific EMC conditions for broadband data transmission radio equipment such as Wi-Fi and Bluetooth.
keywords: specific emc requirements for broadband data transmissions (bt, wifi)

standards.title: 5 GHz RLAN radio spectrum standard
standards.reason: required traits matched: radio. additional traits matched: wifi_5ghz. 5 GHz Wi-Fi spectrum route. Confirm only where 5 GHz Wi-Fi or dual-band Wi-Fi is actually present.
standards.notes: 5 GHz Wi-Fi spectrum route. Confirm only where 5 GHz Wi-Fi or dual-band Wi-Fi is actually present.

standards.title: Assessment of electronic and electrical equipment related to human exposure restrictions for electromagnetic fields
standards.reason: required traits matched: electrical. additional traits matched: electronic, radio. General EMF assessment route for equipment that is handheld, wearable, body-near, or otherwise better assessed under the general exposure framework than EN 62233.
standards.notes: General EMF assessment route for equipment that is handheld, wearable, body-near, or otherwise better assessed under the general exposure framework than EN 62233.
evidence_hint: CB report or equivalent technical evidence

standards.title: Assessment of the compliance of low power electronic and electrical equipment with the basic restrictions related to human exposure to electromagnetic fields
standards.reason: required traits matched: radio. additional traits matched: bluetooth, wifi. Common EMF assessment route for certain low-power radio products.
standards.notes: Common EMF assessment route for certain low-power radio products.
keywords: emf assessment low power rf devices (10mhz to 300ghz)

standards.title: Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment - Emission requirements
standards.reason: required traits matched: electronic. additional traits matched: av_ict, data_storage, microphone, speaker. EMC emission route for AV/ICT-style multimedia equipment. Do not use as the primary appliance EMC route for household appliances.
standards.notes: EMC emission route for AV/ICT-style multimedia equipment. Do not use as the primary appliance EMC route for household appliances.

standards.reason: required traits matched: electronic. additional traits matched: av_ict, data_storage, microphone, speaker. EMC immunity route for AV/ICT-style multimedia equipment. Do not use as the primary appliance EMC route for household appliances.

standards.notes: Typically considered for mains-powered equipment depending on product characteristics and scope. harmonics Keep under EMC listing / other EMC standards.

examples: heart rate and activity data in app account
no personal or health data retained

items.title: Radio Equipment Directive
items.reason: Applicable where the product includes intentional radio transmission or reception.
triggers: Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee, Thread, Matter, NFC, or cellular connectivity

sub_articles.label: Safety
sub_articles.description: Safety and health — LVD safety objectives apply without voltage limit

sub_articles.label: Conditional
sub_articles.description: Privacy / fraud / network / emergency / software / charging routes

items.title: RED DA Cybersecurity
items.reason: Review under the RED delegated cybersecurity regime where radio equipment is internet-connected, app-connected, uses networked software features, requires account or authentication controls, or supports monetary transactions.
triggers: radio equipment with OTA, cloud, or other networked software functions
radio equipment with account, login, password, PIN, or authentication controls
radio equipment supporting payments, subscriptions, ordering, or other monetary-value transfer
items.notes: Treat separately from CRA. Map current RED delegated-act scope to EN 18031-1, -2, and -3 based on network, authentication, and monetary-function features.

items.title: RoHS Directive
items.reason: Generally applicable to electrical and electronic equipment unless a specific exclusion applies.

items.title: REACH Regulation
items.reason: Article-level REACH obligations should be checked for products placed on the EU market.

items.title: General Product Safety Regulation
items.reason: Residual consumer-safety review for products not fully covered by harmonised sector legislation, and horizontal safety obligations for consumer products placed on the EU market.
triggers: residual hazards outside sector-specific conformity routes

items.title: WEEE Directive
items.reason: Review collection, marking, producer-responsibility, and end-of-life obligations for finished electrical and electronic equipment. Since August 2018, WEEE follows an open-scope model unless a specific exclusion applies.
triggers: finished EEE placed on the EU market
crossed-out wheeled bin marking and producer obligations
items.notes: Treat WEEE as a parallel end-of-life and producer-responsibility layer, not as a CE marking route. Exclude obvious fixed-installation and industrial-infrastructure cases from automatic consumer-style WEEE matching.

items.title: General Data Protection Regulation
items.reason: Data-protection obligations should be reviewed where personal data is processed outside the core CE route.

items.title: Ecodesign Directive framework
items.reason: Framework-level ecodesign review for energy-related products. Substantive obligations normally apply only where a product-specific implementing measure exists.

items.title: Off mode, standby and networked standby ecodesign regulation
items.reason: Standby, off-mode, or networked-standby review may be needed for electrical/electronic products.

items.title: Cyber Resilience Act
items.family: Cybersecurity for products with digital elements
items.reason: Future Cyber Resilience Act obligations should be tracked separately for products with digital elements.
triggers: electronic or connected product with software
doc_impacts: software bill of materials and technical documentation review

hero_summary.title: RuleGrid Regulatory Scoping
hero_summary.subtitle: Describe the product clearly to generate the standards route and the applicable legislation path.

items.message: Confirm the radio bands and declared output power.
next_actions: Confirm radio bands, channel families, and declared output power / EIRP.

items.message: Confirm whether the smart features require cloud dependency or can operate locally.
examples: local LAN control without cloud dependency
next_actions: Confirm cloud dependency, account requirement, and whether core functions still work without cloud access.

items.message: Confirm which personal or health-related data categories are processed and whether they are stored locally, in the app, in the cloud, or not retained.
examples: heart rate and activity data in app account
no personal or health data retained
next_actions: Confirm personal / health data categories, storage locations, retention, and cloud transfer scope.

items.message: Confirm whether firmware or software updates are supported, and whether they are OTA, app-driven, local-only, or unavailable.
next_actions: Confirm whether updates are OTA, app-driven, local-only, or unavailable in the field.

findings.finding: General Product Safety Regulation is part of the current compliance route. Residual consumer-safety review for products not fully covered by harmonised sector legislation, and horizontal safety obligations for consumer products placed on the EU market.
findings.action: Prepare: safety information and warnings, traceability data, post-market surveillance inputs

findings.finding: REACH Regulation is part of the current compliance route. Article-level REACH obligations should be checked for products placed on the EU market.
findings.action: Prepare: SVHC review, Article 33 communication, substance compliance records

findings.finding: Radio Equipment Directive is part of the current compliance route. Applicable where the product includes intentional radio transmission or reception.
findings.action: Prepare: EU Declaration of Conformity, radio test evidence, EMC under RED, +1 more

findings.finding: RED DA Cybersecurity is part of the current compliance route. Review under the RED delegated cybersecurity regime where radio equipment is internet-connected, app-connected, uses networked software features, requires account or authentication controls, or supports monetary transactions.
findings.action: Prepare: EU Declaration of Conformity, cybersecurity evidence, EN 18031 part mapping, +1 more Confirm: internet-connected radio equipment, radio equipment with OTA, cloud, or other networked software functions, +2 more

findings.finding: RoHS Directive is part of the current compliance route. Generally applicable to electrical and electronic equipment unless a specific exclusion applies.
findings.action: Prepare: EU Declaration of Conformity, material declarations, IEC 63000 technical documentation

findings.finding: WEEE Directive is part of the current compliance route. Review collection, marking, producer-responsibility, and end-of-life obligations for finished electrical and electronic equipment. Since August 2018, WEEE follows an open-scope model unless a specific exclusion applies.
findings.action: Prepare: product marking review, EPR / registration review, user information review, +1 more

findings.finding: Confirm the radio bands and declared output power. Affects: RED, RED-DA.
findings.action: Next: Confirm radio bands, channel families, and declared output power / EIRP. Clarify with: Bluetooth LE 2.4 GHz, Wi-Fi 2.4/5 GHz, +1 more

findings.finding: EN 300 328 selected as a harmonized standard route. required traits matched: radio. additional traits matched: bluetooth, wifi. Commonly relevant for products using 2.4 GHz radio technologies such as Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Thread, or Matter over 2.4 GHz.
findings.action: Collect: technical construction file, test report Check: rf

findings.finding: EN 301 489-1 selected as a harmonized standard route. required traits matched: radio. additional traits matched: bluetooth, wifi. Common EMC framework standard for radio equipment.
findings.action: Collect: technical construction file, test report Check: emission, immunity, +1 more
